scenarios.title: Concrete class without interface
scenarios.expected: Expected no finding unless substitution/test seam needed.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-solid-deep-review. Scenario: Concrete class without interface. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected no finding unless substitution/test seam needed.

scenarios.title: High-level policy directly creates file system dependency
scenarios.expected: Expected DIP finding if it harms testing/change.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-solid-deep-review. Scenario: High-level policy directly creates file system dependency. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected DIP finding if it harms testing/change.

scenarios.title: Speculative abstraction (YAGNI)
scenarios.expected: Expected false-positive rejection when agent suggests extracting an interface for a class with only one implementation and no test mocks.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-solid-deep-review. Scenario: Speculative abstraction (YAGNI). Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected false-positive rejection when agent suggests extracting an interface for a class with only one implementation and no test mocks.

scenarios.title: Clean well-structured codebase
scenarios.expected: Expected zero findings when the repository has proportionate abstractions and clear boundaries.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-solid-deep-review. Scenario: Clean well-structured codebase. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected zero findings when the repository has proportionate abstractions and clear boundaries.

scenarios.title: OCP false positive on stable code
scenarios.expected: Expected no recommendation to apply Open/Closed Principle when the underlying code is working and never changes.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-solid-deep-review. Scenario: OCP false positive on stable code. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected no recommendation to apply Open/Closed Principle when the underlying code is working and never changes.

scenarios.title: ISP true positive
scenarios.expected: Expected Interface Segregation Principle finding when a class implements a 10-method interface but only uses 1 method, causing bloated dependencies.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-solid-deep-review. Scenario: ISP true positive. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected Interface Segregation Principle finding when a class implements a 10-method interface but only uses 1 method, causing bloated dependencies.
